summary: Regression smoke test of refactored frontend components (Header, CategoryPage, ProductDetail+Sections, JivoChat, variants.js). All core flows pass: home renders, mega-menu MS & Antivirus open on hover, currency switching USD↔GBP changes price symbols, dark-mode toggle adds 'dark' class on <html>, category page filters render with 4 products in Office 2024 PC and 19 cards across, shop page has 37 cards, product detail renders variants (5 buttons, 7 disabled/blurred elements), Add-to-Cart updates header badge, cart page renders with totals, Proceed-to-Checkout opens ProAssist Premium upsell modal correctly, declining advances to /checkout with form (14 inputs). JivoChat opens, AI streams a proper GPT-5 response (e.g. 'Yes—UCODE SOFTTECH LLC sells genuine Microsoft Office 2024 for PC and Mac as a one-time purchase…'). Mobile @390px: no horizontal overflow on home or checkout; hamburger opens mobile menu, MS group expands to 12 links.

issues: Browser tab title is still the CRA boilerplate 'Emergent | Fullstack App' instead of 'UCODE SOFTTECH LLC' brand. Update public/index.html <title> and/or add per-page titles.
Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby — accessibility warning in console (non-blocking). Add a DialogDescription or aria-describedby on CartSheet and ProAssist modal.

action_items: (Optional) Update document.title to 'UCODE SOFTTECH LLC' branding in /app/frontend/public/index.html.
(Optional, a11y) Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to CartSheet and the ProAssist upsell modal to silence Radix warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: ProductDetail.jsx is 419 lines — already split into ProductDetailSections.jsx which is good; if it grows further, consider splitting the variant matrix UI into its own component.
Header.jsx (~290 lines) is well-factored after refactor: MS/AV mega menus, mobile menu, header actions are clearly separated.
variants.js (96 lines) is concise and reusable.
Backend /api/chat correctly streams via SSE and handles lead-marker extraction; LEAD_RE stripping before persisting clean message is correct.
No console errors detected; only minor Radix a11y warnings.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend regression after major refactor PASSED end-to-end at https://software-staging.preview.emergentagent.com. Verified mega-menu, currency, dark mode, category filtering, shop grid, product detail + variants + Add-to-Cart, cart updates, ProAssist upsell modal, Checkout form (mock), JivoChat AI streaming response from gpt-5, and mobile 390px responsiveness (no horizontal overflow). Only cosmetic items remain: document.title is CRA default and Radix DialogContent a11y warning.
